  fhir:description [ fhir:v "Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetMedicationHistory\n(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:activityprescription:actoutcome:GetMedicationHistoryResponder:2).\nRepresenterar responsens informationsstruktur — läkemedelshistorik per patient.\n\nOBS: Kontraktet är tämligen omfattande. Se tillämpningsanvisningen\n(AB_clinicalprocess_activityprescription_actoutcome.docx) för implementationsdetaljer."] ; #

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Dosering där ordinatören har bestämt mängd och periodicitet." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Den högsta tillåtna mängden under en viss period." ] ;

fhir:id [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Förskrivning" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Se XSD DispensationAuthorizationType för fullständig struktur.\nNyckelfält: dispensationAuthorizationId (1..1), dispensationAuthorizer (1..1,\ncareUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), prescriptionSignatura (1..1),\ndrug (0..1 XOR: unstructured/merchandise/drugArticle/drug/generics, samma mönster som ordination),\ntotalAmount/packageUnit (båda eller ingetdera — Regel 1.8), validUntil (0..1),\nnonReplaceable (0..1, enum Prescriber/Patient)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Information om administrering av läkemedel" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Bara administreringstillfällen som faktiskt ägt rum kan anges.\nSe XSD AdministrationType för fullständig struktur.\nNyckelfält: administrationId (1..1), administrationTime (1..1, start/end —\nminst ett av start/end — Regel 1.8), administeringHealthcareProfessional (1..1,\ncareUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), routeOfAdministration (0..1),\ndrug (0..1 XOR), administrationComment (0..1)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
fhir:base [
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration" ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Sambandsklass" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Alla meddelandeposter som i ordinationen pekas ut med samma relationstyp.\nSe XSD RelationType för fullständig struktur.\nNyckelfält: code (1..1 CVType), referredInformation (1..*:\nid/IIType 1..1, type/CVType 1..1 originalText 'caa-ga'/'chb-go',\ninformationOwner/InformationOwnerType 1..1)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation" ] ;

fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ]       ] ;

fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Logisk modell för tjänstekontraktet GetMedicationHistory\n(RIV-TA urn:riv:clinicalprocess:activityprescription:actoutcome:GetMedicationHistoryResponder:2).\nRepresenterar responsens informationsstruktur — läkemedelshistorik per patient.\n\nOBS: Kontraktet är tämligen omfattande. Se tillämpningsanvisningen\n(AB_clinicalprocess_activityprescription_actoutcome.docx) för implementationsdetaljer." ]     ] [

      ( fhir:type [

fhir:id [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.dispensationAuthorization" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Förskrivning" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Se XSD DispensationAuthorizationType för fullständig struktur.\nNyckelfält: dispensationAuthorizationId (1..1), dispensationAuthorizer (1..1,\ncareUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), prescriptionSignatura (1..1),\ndrug (0..1 XOR: unstructured/merchandise/drugArticle/drug/generics, samma mönster som ordination),\ntotalAmount/packageUnit (båda eller ingetdera — Regel 1.8), validUntil (0..1),\nnonReplaceable (0..1, enum Prescriber/Patient)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "1" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.administration" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Information om administrering av läkemedel" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Bara administreringstillfällen som faktiskt ägt rum kan anges.\nSe XSD AdministrationType för fullständig struktur.\nNyckelfält: administrationId (1..1), administrationTime (1..1, start/end —\nminst ett av start/end — Regel 1.8), administeringHealthcareProfessional (1..1,\ncareUnitHSAId/careGiverHSAId=0..0), routeOfAdministration (0..1),\ndrug (0..1 XOR), administrationComment (0..1)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;
      ( fhir:type [
fhir:code [ fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [
fhir:id [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation" ] ;
fhir:path [ fhir:v "inera-ehds-lm-medication-history.medicationMedicalRecord.medicationMedicalRecordBody.medicationPrescription.relation" ] ;
fhir:short [ fhir:v "Sambandsklass" ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Alla meddelandeposter som i ordinationen pekas ut med samma relationstyp.\nSe XSD RelationType för fullständig struktur.\nNyckelfält: code (1..1 CVType), referredInformation (1..*:\nid/IIType 1..1, type/CVType 1..1 originalText 'caa-ga'/'chb-go',\ninformationOwner/InformationOwnerType 1..1)." ] ;
fhir:min [ fhir:v "0"^^xsd:nonNegativeInteger ] ;
fhir:max [ fhir:v "*" ] ;

fhir:code [ fhir:v "BackboneElement"^^xsd:anyURI ]       ] )     ] [

fhir:short [ fhir:v "Patientens kön. KV Kön (OID 1.2.752.129.2.2.1.1) bör användas. CVType-begränsning (Regel 1.6): originalText är förbjudet (0..0) för könsfältet — code, codeSystem och displayName ska anges." ] ;
fhir:definition [ fhir:v "Patientens kön. KV Kön (OID 1.2.752.129.2.2.1.1) bör användas. CVType-begränsning (Regel 1.6): originalText är förbjudet (0..0) för könsfältet — code, codeSystem och displayName ska anges." ] ;
